stale_warning: Nightlights data is 11 days old (latest: 2026-05-31). Sar data is 5 days old (latest: 2026-06-06). Vegetation data is 8 days old (latest: 2026-06-03). NASA/satellite processing lag.
situation_brief: Tehran nighttime radiance has collapsed 50% from pre-war baseline, consistent with widespread power grid failure. Strait of Hormuz commercial shipping at 36 vessels/day (-74% vs pre-war baseline of 138). 3 facilities sustained strike damage, including Jubail Desal.
